{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Jade Eye School
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Underlady]] of the [[Jade Eye School]] treated [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
